com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs

Class AbstractPrimitiveArray<W extends AbstractArrayWriter>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeArray<W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    PBoolArray, PByteArray, PCharArray, PDoubleArray, PFloatArray, PIntArray, PLongArray, PShortArray

    public abstract class AbstractPrimitiveArray<W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
extends AbstractNativeArray<W>
    A native array of fixed-width elements with checked and unchecked access.
